title: Aero SMP
description: A no-nonsense server with just Create and Create Aeronautics.
body:
# Aero SMP!
You know what this server is about. We've all been waiting for it, and it's finally here! If you want to play create aeronautics in survival with no fluff, then this is the server for you. Probably the most stable create aeronautics SMP!!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/50ltHJOBeWk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
